title: tragus pumilus
intro: Tragus pumilus, also known as the small-leaved tragus, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family that is native to Africa. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Tragus pumilus include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to relieve symptoms of colds and flu.
